description: Letter sent from Rashīd addressed to Shelomo Ḥalafta Yerushalmi, in Bulaq. In Judaeo-Arabic. Probably the same sender as ENA 2855.21. Dating: late 15th or early 16th century. Well-preserved. Needs examination for content.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מ-Rosetta ל-Būlāq. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
